Name: QWC_CHANGE_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the parameters for world tendency changes.

Fields.Name: Player (Black)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to Black World Tendency (for the player) for this action.

Fields.Name: Player (White)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to White World Tendency (for the player) for this action.

Fields.Name: Player (Left)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to World Tendency (for the player) for this action.

Fields.Name: Player (Right)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to World Tendency (for the player) for this action.

Fields.Name: Area (Black)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to Black World Tendency (for the area) for this action.

Fields.Name: Area (White)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to White World Tendency (for the area) for this action.

Fields.Name: Area (Left)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to World Tendency (for the area) for this action.

Fields.Name: Area (Right)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to World Tendency (for the area) for this action.
